name: @mframework/localization
description: Automated localization module for the M Framework.
author: M Framework

scripts.postinstall: node -e "try{require('flat')}catch(e){console.warn('Skipping @mframework/localization postinstall (missing deps)'); process.exit(0)}" && node -e "try{require('tsx')}catch(e){console.warn('Skipping @mframework/localization postinstall (tsx missing)'); process.exit(0)}" && tsx src/scripts/prepare-translation-status.ts
